'''Orbot Droids''' were [[Droideka/Legends|droideka]]-like [[Droid/Legends|droids]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They were carried aboard [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] and also saw use during the [[occupation of Bespin]].<ref name="SEMP" />
